name: Juliette Michele (@BishoujoMom)
description:
Twitter link: https://twitter.com/BishoujoMom/media

Bishoujo Mom aka Juliette Michele.

She is a cosplayer, model and CEO of Kimochii Con and known as your favorite E-Mommy. When she isn’t streaming games or deep diving into obscure Internet rabbit holes, she is working hard on bringing your fantasies to life through cosplay and spicy content.

She will be bringing a taste of Kimochii Con to NishiFest with her Kimochii Con Cow Café and can’t wait to serve you.

Watch this if you want to know more about her: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=543E7ajDsT0
creator: HyperActive
